name: UpdatePartitionRequest
description: UpdatePartitionRequest schema from Amazon Glue API

allOf.description: The ID of the Data Catalog where the partition to be updated resides. If none is provided, the Amazon Web Services account ID is used by default.
The name of the catalog database in which the table in question resides.
The name of the table in which the partition to be updated is located.
List of partition key values that define the partition to update.

The new partition object to update the partition to.

The Values property can't be changed. If you want to change the partition key values for a partition, delete and recreate the partition.
